message:
fix: UTF-8 safe string truncation in antipatterns module

- Changed truncate functions to use character-count instead of byte-length
  slicing, preventing panics on multi-byte UTF-8 characters (emojis, CJK, etc.)
- Added test_truncate_utf8_safety test with emoji and Japanese examples
- Minor cleanup: consolidated Color import, fixed severity list in CLI help

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
